title: CapMAS: Caption factuality enhancing MultiAgent System (atomic propositions + MLLM verify)
query: atomic claim image caption verification MLLM
overlap_assessment: Research procedure decomposes captions into atomic propositions and verifies each against the image — closest academic neighbor to mm-claim-audit. Not a portable SKILL.md; requires training stack and caption-revision loop, not planted-error catch-rate harness.

title: PatchTrust: Black-Box Hallucination Detection via Patch-Level Retrieval Scoring
overlap_assessment: Black-box per-claim spatial grounding via ColPali retrieval — no agent skill package; needs retrieval encoder stack not cheap OpenRouter VL SKILL.md.

title: GAVEL: Grounded Caption Error Verification and Localization
overlap_assessment: Verify+explain+localize benchmark; strong closed models still struggle. Not shipped as portable agent skill with with/without ablation.

title: AgentFact: Multimodal Fact-Checking — An Agent-based Approach
overlap_assessment: Five-agent web-evidence misinformation pipeline on social posts — multimodal but evidence retrieval + explanation, not cheap VL caption↔pixel planted-error audit for agents shipping alt text.

title: jwynia/agent-skills@fact-check (SKILL.md)
overlap_assessment: Prose claim extraction + external-source verification; no image↔caption atomic VL verify or verification_catch_rate on planted visual errors. Primary incumbent we supersede on modality.

title: cliffyan28/fact-checker (OpenClaw multimodal fact-check skill)
query: multimodal fact check agent skill github
overlap_assessment: Portable multimodal fact-check skill with atomic-claim decomposition for news/images — overlaps on 'verify claims about images' but targets misinformation/web evidence (reverse search, EXIF), not a cheap VL planted-error caption audit harness with measured with/without Δ vs text-only baseline.

title: jwynia/agent-skills@fact-check (~537 installs)
overlap_assessment: Marketplace leader for prose fact-check; text claims only. Named supersession incumbent.

title: garrytan/gbrain@cross-modal-review (~166 installs)
overlap_assessment: Cross-MODEL second-opinion naming trap — not text↔image consistency audit. Cite as confusion neighbor, not same form.

title: shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps@fact-checker (~3.3K installs)
overlap_assessment: Text fact-checker app pattern; no multimodal planted-error metrics.

title: npx skills find 'multimodal audit' / 'image caption consistency'
overlap_assessment: No portable skills.sh hit for caption↔image planted-error audit with catch-rate metrics; vendor multimodal SDK kits only.

title: DEFAME: Dynamic Evidence-based FAct-checking with Multimodal Experts (ICML 2025)
overlap_assessment: Six-stage open-domain text-image claim verification with web evidence — research pipeline, not cheap agent SKILL.md with with/without harness.

title: HN: Why VLM OCRs hallucinate vs deterministic OCR
overlap_assessment: Practitioner pain: VLMs language-prior over pixels; motivates independent claim verify but not a skill product.
